name: Mediastack API
what_it_does: Delivers real-time news data from 7500+ sources across 50+ languages via a simple REST API with multilingual support.
use_cases: Keyword-based news alerting across multiple languages
Content pipelines requiring international news coverage
not_for: High-volume production use on free tier (500 req/month limit)
Historical news retrieval beyond recent content
best_when: Building multilingual news monitoring or international content features where source breadth across languages matters more than depth.
avoid_when: You need high request volume, full article text, or deep historical archives.

auth.notes: Single API key passed as query parameter; no header-based auth option on free tier

pricing.free_tier_limits: 500 requests/month, HTTP only (no HTTPS on free tier)
pricing.notes: HTTPS requires paid plan; free tier sends data over HTTP which is a security concern for production use

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Standard JSON error objects with code and message; error codes documented in API reference
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Read-only news API; all requests safely retryable
known_agent_gotchas: Free tier uses HTTP not HTTPS — agents must use paid plan for secure production use
500 req/month free limit is extremely low for agents in loops
API key passed in URL query string on free tier risks exposure in logs
Part of Apilayer ecosystem; service quality tied to Apilayer platform reliability

security_score_components.security_notes: Critical: free tier transmits over HTTP; API key in query parameter; TLS only available on paid plans — significant security gap
